Label: Statement
Description: A reified RDF statement (subject-predicate-object) representing one association edge and carrying its probability weight, score type, edge type, and provenance (source and generating method).

Label: Factor
Description: A latent factor (about 4,000) learned by the EAGGL method that models a disease mechanism shared across genes, gene sets, and traits.

Label: Gene
Description: A human gene, identified by its NCBI (Entrez) Gene identifier. About 20,000 genes are represented.

Label: GeneFactorAssociation
Description: A reified association linking a gene to a latent factor (disease mechanism).

Label: GeneInGeneSetAssociation
Description: A reified association recording membership of a gene in a gene set.

Label: GeneSet
Description: A set of genes derived from a CFDE data-generation program dataset, used as a unit of evidence that links genes to traits.

Label: GeneSetFactorAssociation
Description: A reified association linking a gene set to a latent factor.

Label: GeneSetTraitAssociation
Description: A reified association linking a gene set to a trait it predicts.

Label: GeneTraitAssociation
Description: A reified association linking a gene to a trait, annotated with a probability weight, score type, and generating method.

Label: GenerationMethod
Description: A computational method used to infer associations in the graph, namely PIGEAN or EAGGL.

Label: ScoreType
Description: The type of statistical score reported for an association, such as the PIGEAN combined score.

Label: Trait
Description: A human trait, disease, or phenotype endpoint (about 7,000), identified using ontologies such as Orphanet, EFO, MONDO, and HPO.

Label: TraitFactorAssociation
Description: A reified association linking a trait to a latent factor that models its mechanism.

Label: source
Description: The data source or method from which the association was derived (e.g. PIGEAN, EAGGL).

Label: object
Description: The entity in the object position of a reified association.

Label: predicate
Description: The relationship type (object property) asserted by a reified association.

Label: subject
Description: The entity in the subject position of a reified association.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable label for an entity.

Label: was generated by
Description: The generation method (PIGEAN or EAGGL) that produced the association.

Label: edgeType
Description: A string describing the type of edge represented by the association (e.g. Gene_to_Trait).

Label: Gene_in_GeneSet
Description: Links a gene to a gene set it belongs to.

Label: GeneSet_to_Factor
Description: Links a gene set to a latent factor.

Label: GeneSet_to_Trait
Description: Links a gene set to a human trait it predicts.

Label: Gene_to_Factor
Description: Links a gene to a latent factor (disease mechanism) it contributes to.

Label: Gene_to_Trait
Description: Links a gene to a human trait it is inferred to be relevant to.

Label: originalLabel
Description: The original source label for a trait, before normalization to an ontology identifier.

Label: scoreType
Description: The type of statistical score reported for the association.

Label: Trait_to_Factor
Description: Links a trait to a latent factor that models its mechanism.

Label: weight
Description: The probability or score of the association (a numeric value).
